corrections.note: Printed form has rough breathing and acute: ὥδευον.
Image clearly reads τῇ Ῥάγης, not Ῥάγῃ.
Printed page uses lunate theta form; normalize only if preserving exact glyphs matters. Main textual reading is αὐλισθησόμεθα.
Printed apparatus reads καὶ ἀφῆκεν ἐξ αὐτοῦ ἱκανὸν μέρος.

corrections.current: Καὶ τότε εἰσῆλθεν εἰς Μηδείαν καὶ τῷ ἠγγίσει εἰς Ἐκβάτανα, 11λέγει
corrections.correct: Καὶ τότε εἰσῆλθεν εἰς Μηδείαν καὶ τῷ ἤγγισεν εἰς Ἐκβάτανα, 11ἔλεγεν
corrections.note: The image shows τῷ ἤγγισεν ... ἔλεγεν, not τῷ ἠγγίσει ... λέγει.
Accent on final syllable in the name.
Closing bracket after c.b is present in print.
There is a space before b in the printed siglum sequence.

uncertain.note: Transcript has Ῥαγουήλ; image may read Ῥαγουὴλ with grave, but accent normalization should be conservative.
Name Τωβείᾳ/Τωβίᾳ in apparatus line is small; transcript's Τωβείᾳ seems plausible but not fully certain from image.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct; one clear substantive error at Ῥάγης. Apparatus has several substantive misreadings, especially ἀνήνεγκεν and ἱκανὸν μέρος. Ignored mere line-break hyphenation except where it affected wording.
